steps.t: There is a Gapholt guard behind a mountain of papers. You should speak with a guard to see if there is an exception that can be made to help the refug…
Thane Nothmar is near the bridge of Gapholt. The guard told you to take your concerns to Thane Nothmar.
Hrothwaru is near the bridge of Gapholt. Thane Nothmar would not recant his position regarding entry into Gapholt.
